programme.desc: Holman houses over 170 men who have been sentenced to death and are awaiting execution, as well as 360 who are serving life sentences without parole; all are living with the inevitable: that their only chance of getting out will be inside a coffin.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Burnout is a constant problem and unexcused absences create staff shortages at Alabama's Holman Correctional Facility; that means that designated jobs, like cell searches, which each shift has a requirement to perform, don't always get done.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Behind every murder is a motive; Behind every murder is a story and behind some murders, there is a person someone thought they could trust.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Memorabilia legend Bill Mastro helps turn a childhood hobby into a billion dollar business and rigs bids to scam collectors and sellers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: U.S. law enforcement teams up with Jamaican authorities to stop criminals using call centers in Jamaica to flood the U.S. with lies about lottery millions won by unsuspecting victims.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Attorney Kevin Cohen uses his adoption annex to take advantage of couples seeking to adopt children.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Three unforgettable inmates, each one about to cross the threshold to freedom; witness their joys, their fears, their triumphs and discover that sometimes the only thing tougher than being in prison, is staying out.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Grantt Culliver, warden of one of Alabama's toughest prisons, Holman Correctional Facility, doesn't miss a beat in getting into a disruptive inmate's face, but he's also compassionate and gentle when the situation calls for it.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Of the nearly 1,000 inmates at Holman, the 200 most dangerous must be segregated from the rest; Bobby Gilbert, or "Snake", has spent 19 of his 43 years in the solitary confinement of Ad Seg. because of his violent behavior.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Correctional officers are outnumbered 10 to 1 and are constantly searching over 1,000 inmates to find their home-made weapons, which are very easy to conceal; hours after the Lock Up crew wraps shooting, an inmate is stabbed in the honor dorm.

programme.title: Lockup: Holman: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Holman houses over 170 men who have been sentenced to death and are awaiting execution, as well as 360 who are serving life sentences without parole; all are living with the inevitable: that their only chance of getting out will be inside a coffin.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Ryohei has injured his left hand and is dehydrated. He receives permission from Colonnello to use a recovery technique that he had been saving.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The second battle is between the Lightning Guardians. It is being held in the rain on a special field that spreads the lightning across the ground.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Lambo looks like he's going to win the Lightning Guardian battle when he turns into his Twenty-years later form.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: The third battle between Storm Guardians Gokudera and Belphagor is a timed death match. The battle takes place on the third floor of the school.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Gokudera is able to damage Belphagor with his Rocket Bombs. But when Belphagor sees his own blood, he becomes excited and shows his true skills.

programme.title: Reborn

programme.title: Reborn

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: It appears as if Hibari has put an end to the battle, but things start to look different when Mukuro shoots himself with a gun.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: In response to Tsuna's desire to defeat Mukuro, Reborn creates new items, the Criticism Shot and the X Gloves. Tsuna is powered up as a result.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Tsuna has advanced to his second year of middle school.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Kyoko is coming to Tsuna's house for a visit, and Tsuna begins cleaning his room for the event. But after a nap, he finds a man's corpse in his room!

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Hana Kurokawa considers the boys in her grade to be monkeys, but amazingly falls in love with Adult Lambo and asks Tsuna to introduce him to her.

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Nana wins a trip on a cruise ship. Tsuna is ready to enjoy some peace and relaxation, but why are Reborn and the others on the same ship?

programme.title: Reborn

programme.title: Reborn
programme.desc: Tsuna cannot swim, and doesn't want to look bad in front of Kyoko. Yamamoto proposes to help him at the pool, but offers overly abstract advice.

programme.title: Reborn

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Error de identidad
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan un atentado local, pero enfrentan tensión y resistencia de la comunidad. Mientras, Frank debe lidiar con las consecuencias políticas cuando un hombre golpea a un oficial que fue demasiado agresivo en su interrogatorio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Lazos que unen
programme.desc: La lealtad de Danny se pone a prueba en el caso de un amigo de la infancia vinculado a la mafia. Frank se entera de que el crimen aumenta por una decisión judicial.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Espectro
programme.desc: Danny busca al distribuidor de una nueva y letal marca de heroína. Frank hace todo lo posible para ayudar a sacar las drogas de las calles.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Asuntos pendientes
programme.desc: Danny y Maria buscan a un veterano con posible estrés postraumático. Frank es sorprendido en una conferencia de prensa por una mujer que busca justicia para su hija asesinada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 9/04/2016. When classified footage from a top secret surveillance satellite was lost in the Pacific Ocean during the Cold War, the U.S. military engaged in a race against time to find and recover the footage before it fell into enemy hands.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. Dr. Sanjay Gupta travels to Japan to see how inhabitants of Tokyo deal with work-induced stress and to learn why people in Okinawa live such long lives.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/13/2019. While in India, Dr. Sanjay Gupta explores the connection between the reemergence of traditional Indian health techniques, Ayurveda and Yoga.

programme.title: Chasing Life With Dr. Sanjay Gupta
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2019. To explore the benefits of living at high altitude for heart health, Dr. Sanjay Gupta heads into the Andes of Bolivia.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A loitering suspect flees when approached by police, and a traffic stop leaves a woman concerned for the future of her marriage.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a man about to confront his wife for her accusations about his sexuality, search a baton-wielding cyclist, and check the prints of a man with no identification.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A burglary results in an act of solidarity, a foot pursuit ends when the K-9 unit shows up, and a person with a substance user disorder leaves a strong impression on an officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer and get a crack in the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is shocked and saddened when, after working with Dr. Raymond Langston on the Dick & Jane murders, Grissom announces that his time as a CSI has come to an end and offers Langston a permanent position on the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The first day on the job for Dr. Langston turns from bad to worse when a simple burglary case quickly overlaps with a complicated arson and homicide case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an FBI agent who was working undercover is found brutally murdered, the CSI team is called in to assist the victim's partner in finding the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga a un asesino canibal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga un asesinato con implicaciones cibernéticas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un crimen actual que está ligado a un robo de la mafia ocurrido hace 25 años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Finlay tiene que lidiar con una bomba puesta en su coche, mientras que Russell recibe una llamada de alguien que afirma ser el asesino de Gig Harbor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando un robo y un tiroteo mortal en una tienda de marihuana terapéutica.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara y Greg son puestos en cuarentena después de encontrarse en la escena de un crimen que está contaminado con un patógeno mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sospecha que se ha cometido un delito cuando el experimento científico de un profesor de química resulta terrible.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle y Finlay intentan de relajarse en una conferencia forense cuando ocurre un tiroteo masivo en el sitio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La frustración se acumula para el equipo de CSI cuando aparece otra víctima y toda la evidencia apunta al asesino de Gig Harbor. Las estrellas invitadas son Mark-Paul Goselaar, Mark Valley y Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer alcoholizada y drogada en la piscina de un centro de rehabilitación.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI profundiza en el morboso mundo de las “muñecas de caucho” cuando investigan el asesinato de un hombre apuñalado en un callejón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en la cárcel del condado de Clark después de que un interno tropieza con un cuerpo mientras huye de los oficiales.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la extraña muerte de un hombre que ha sido asesinado no una, sino dos veces. Sharon Osbourne es la estrella invitada en el papel de Elise Massey, la directora del campeonato de billar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La investigación del CSI sobre la víctima de un aparente accidente y fuga, los lleva al mundo aeronáutico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team chases a sadistic killer who takes women’s eyes, and a new nemesis challenges Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protects a Mexican police chief from the mysterious assassin who killed her husband.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In a deserted mansion, the CSIs find a body hanging that appears to have been killed by a vampire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an entire family disappears into thin air, Horatio vows to find them, dead or alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs expose the seedy underbelly of children’s beauty pageants when a contestant's mom is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a neighborhood do-gooder is murdered, Horatio and the CSIs discover that he was planning to blow the whistle on something big.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the Miami Taunter kills again, Horatio comes face-to-face with the matriarch of the suspected killer's family, who may or may not help his investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis coach is nearly killed, Calleigh discovers a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar un caso extraño relacionado con el vudú y se asustan cuando comienzan a ocurrir accidentes extraños en el laboratorio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de secuestro se vuelve personal para Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la víctima inesperadamente resulta ser la hermana de Boa Vista.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es decapitado mientras realiza un atrevido truco con su auto, el equipo sospecha que fue más que un simple accidente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio descubre un complot mortal contra la ciudad de Miami después de que una joven es asesinada en un evento benéfico. Él y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un reclutador de marines es asesinado, el equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo del reclutamiento de soldados y las familias que dejan atrás.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Están juzgando a Sonya Barak por ayudar en un complot para destruir Miami cuando su propia gente intenta matarla a tiros. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan al exmarido de Natalia, la evidencia sugiere que ella lo mató. Muchas personas tenían motivos para matar a Nick. Horatio y los CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida del detective Frank Tripp pende de un hilo cuando pisa una mina terrestre mientras investiga la escena de un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran un camión lleno de armas confiscadas y devuelven las armas al público, Horatio relaciona el crimen con Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Declaran muerto a un miembro del equipo tras recibir un disparo en la cabeza. No queriendo darse por vencido, Horatio hace que el equipo de CSI corra al hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar cuando los padres de una niñera en un vecindario exclusivo son brutalmente asesinados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de caza se vuelve mortal cuando un oso ataca a alguien del grupo y la evidencia sugiere un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un rico promotor inmobiliario, Horatio y el equipo de CSI sospecha de la esposa y las dos hermanas gemelas secretas de ella.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio sospecha que el supervisor del condado y los dueños de un casino de nativos norteamericanos cercano pueden estar involucrados cuando se encuentra a una víctima de asesinato sin el cuero cabelludo.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators finds a body on a rooftop and must find the killer who is manipulating crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: With a sniper lose in New York City, Mac must relive an abduction case that might have created one of the city's deadliest foes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators experience eerie occurrences after a woman is found who has literally been scared to death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac goes up against the deputy chief of detectives when a dark secret from the chief's past threatens his reputation and family.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a man in full clown costume shoots a bakery owner, the CSIs investigate and discover a decision from Flack's past that may put him in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Spanish club promoter is found dead, Detective Mac Taylor must battle with the head of Barcelona's crime lab to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a tractor-trailer carrying party guests mysteriously ends up at the bottom of the Hudson River, the CSIs must exhume the soggy remains.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs track down a suave and charming hitman, their investigation uncovers a conspiracy with far-reaching implications.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a serial rapist is murdered, restrained in the same manner as his victims, the CSIs weigh a feeling of justice against their sense of duty.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a conspiracy-obsessed woman is found dead, the CSIs investigate and discover that some of her theories may have had some truth to them.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a popular student at Manhattan's most elite private school is murdered, the CSIs find themselves in the competitive world of the overprivileged.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo balances personal and professional challenges when her adopted daughter, Ellie, is the key witness in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team enters the competitive world of gourmet food trucks when one explodes at a SoHo food festival while Hawkes is there with his girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando un rico agente inmobiliario es encontrado muerto en una casa, Mac y Stella trabajan con pruebas que sugieren que él fue secuestrador o secuestrado.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Mac encuentran un cadáver en un camión de sal que luego identifican como un ejecutivo de deportes extremos de alto poder.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un estudiante universitario en un laberinto del museo de la granja del condado de Queens, el equipo de CSI descubre una fraternidad parecida a un culto con severos castigos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac investiga la muerte de una niña encontrada en una bañera llena de pétalos de rosa. Stella cuestiona la muerte de un hombre que cayó en su pecera.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac y Danny investigan un caso en el que encontraron muerto a un ex convicto delirante acostado sobre una cama de dinero en su casa.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo investiga un caso en el que ocurren asesinatos inspirados en trucos de magia, incluido el de una mujer cortada por la mitad mientras estaba en una caja de madera.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Danny y Lindsay encuentran al popular chef Alec Green muerto en la bodega de su restaurante de moda con un sacacorchos colgando del pecho.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un caballero de brillante armadura empalado con una lanza en Central Park y un empresario apuñalado con un picahielos en un hotel cercano comparten una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Anulan la sentencia contra un asesino en serie cuando Mac encarcela al oficial que lo arrestó, pero aparece una víctima con la firma del asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: Hortensia Saga

programme.desc: Alfred and Deflotte are desperate to escape from their jailer Lucan; Didier reveals the truth to the princess before sending her to her execution.

programme.title: Hortensia Saga

programme.title: As Miss Beelzebub Likes it.
programme.desc: Pandemonium is full of fallen angels; Mullin is excited to work for Beelzebub.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre la muerte de un veterano de la Segunda Guerra Mundial se detuvo por completo cuando el sospechoso principal tenía una cortada sólida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un tiroteo desde un vehículo deja un hombre muerto y otro gravemente herido. Las llamadas de teléfonos celulares y los casquillos de bala apuntan a un sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a una mujer muerta en el piso del cuarto de su apartamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Apenas unas semanas antes de que una testigo testifique contra el hombre acusado de agredirla sexualmente, ella es asesinada en el patio delantero de su propia casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ocurre un accidente y los responsables se dan a la fuga, causando la muerte de un joven muy popular. Los investigadores se ven enfrentados con la tarea de buscar un barco entre otros 1200.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El asesinato de un turista estadounidense en un centro turístico mexicano centró los recursos policiales en ambos lados de la frontera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1988, cuando un paciente muere inesperadamente en el consultorio del neurólogo de California, Richard Boggs, la policía comienza lo que creen que será una investigación de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una mordidita
programme.desc: En la escena de un crimen, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato, varios pelos extraños y huellas dactilares desconocidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Alianza nefasta
programme.desc: Cuando una joven desapareció, la policía temió que fuera la última víctima de una serie de crímenes similares.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.desc: When Jake thinks his feelings for Clare are unrequited, he escapes to his cabin with friends hoping one last summer bash will help him move on.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Unfortunately the popular girls’ clique she so badly wants to be a part of does not include her quirky friend Imogen. When a game of truth or dare turns into a senior prank, how far will Fiona go to secure her place among the popular girls?

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met

programme.title: Monsters We Met

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, how will Yell manage without his two front teeth? Zaza falls seriously ill. Founder Annie visits Anatolian guard dog Chobe to see if he is doing his job.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom's quest takes him to London, to investigate a woman with the loudest shout on earth. Annalisa Flanagan who holds the world record.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2000 Mozambique Flood. Heavy rain through February and March 2000 led to massive flooding in Mozambique.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Deploying his own tracking device, Te Radar tries to find out what happens to rubbish that washes into waterways and finds himself shocked by how much plastic floats across the world’s oceans only to soil pristine beaches in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Episode 5

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, Emily takes the cubs on their first trip away from the cubhouse, a walk in the vineyards. She is eager to find out how if all her training has paid off and if the cubs are able to cope in an unfamiliar situation.

programme.title: A New Prehistory
programme.desc: Where do insects come from?

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live. In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff.

programme.title: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story
programme.desc: Kanga Pan – An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary, the first of its kind. A relatively unknown inland waterhole in Mana Pools National Park, Kanga Pan is a gathering point for a melting pot of wildlife species.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: The Caribbean is famous for being a tropical paradise…but it also has a wild and unfamiliar side. Forged by volcanoes and shaped by hurricanes, the islands are unique and the wildlife that inhabits them is as surprising, as it is spectacular.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Kevin and Charity begin divorce proceedings, but the circumstances are exacerbated when Lady Mae learns the truth about Kevin; Grace and Darius's relationship reaches a stalemate.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The anniversary of Faith's death is at hand and Grace shows no sign of giving up her pursuit of Mac; Triumph Pastor Basie Skanks and Jacob receive bad news regarding Triumph Two's finances.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob makes Basie an offer to clear his debt and gain full control of Triumph II; Mac receives bad news from Skip Leonard, which puts him an explosive collision course with Grace.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Mac's showdown sends shockwaves through the family; Jacob offers the Bishop an olive branch; Kevin makes a decision that leaves Charity reeling.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob and Kerissa establish their new ministry; Charity desperately tries to reach Kevin; Darius gets an offer that may take him out of Memphis, leaving Grace to wonder where she fits in his life.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When Sophia and Zora are excluded from the upcoming debutante Cotillion, Lady Mae sets out to make things right; Grace is inspired by Basie's sermon; Charity reaches out to Carlton.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tommy call a meeting of their gang leaders, while Angela organizes surveillance of the event; the unknown assailant strikes again; Ghost reveals his family life to Angela.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha interferes with business at the club when she becomes concerned by Ghost's attitude; Ghost continues his fling with Angela; Tommy sets his sights on a club employee.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tommy and Ruiz settle their differences; Angela works with one of Ruiz's gang members; Ghost forgets Tasha's birthday; Ghost and Angela face the truth about their affair.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha finally sees Angela; Ghost learns a friend may be responsible for the hits; Angela attempts to stop an upcoming attack; Ghost makes a promise to Angela.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost plans a big party at Truth and makes a major decision in an attempt to become a legitimate businessman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the Ninja are put into a cage aboard a hunting party, they learn that their elemental powers will be used to help lure a dragon. Undercover, Cole learns Iron Baron is in search for Firstbourne’s nest – the Mother of All Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a flashback of when Jay first meets Master Wu, Jay awakens to find he’s still with his caged friends returning from their hunting party. Forced into slave labor, Jay’s inspired by his dream of his master when Wu told him to ‘build the impossible’.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Dareth warns his friends just as the Sons of Garmadon ambush their secret headquarters. The Elemental Masters are each captured, except for Lloyd, Nya, Dareth and Skylor, who escape within Nya’s escape vehicle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and his friends lick their wounds, Mystake shares how she managed to escape the Sons of Garmadon earlier -- she’s a shape-shifting Oni.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wastelands, Faith teaches the Ninja how to master their chain rifles and they hunt a dragon. As teen Wu struggles, Kai encourages him to not give up in a lesson of confidence.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Harumi has outed Mystake as the ‘Fake Harumi’. Mystake reveals her true Oni form and battles Garmadon, allowing Skylor to absorb some of his power and escape. In the Realm of Oni and Dragon, the Ninja return to rescue Faith, only to discover it’s a trap.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Garmadon is enraged by the loss of Harumi and releases his wrath by ordering the Oni Titan to turn Ninjago City to ash. Lloyd fears they won’t be able to endure much longer – where are his friends?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Atop their dragons, the Ninja return to Ninjago City amidst Garmadon’s vicious attack. Master Wu and the Ninja join up with Lloyd, Nya, and Dareth and they celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras de aprendizaje! Desde medirse hasta divertirse en la granja, la construcción de formas, revisiones oculares, animales del mundo y sorprender a mamá y papá, ¡es un día de descubrimientos y alegría!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día de aventuras con Little Angel! Desde aprender a comer sano hasta ordenar, pasando por la construcción, la seguridad a la hora de comer, consejos para cuidar niños y trucos de astucia, ¡es un viaje de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious message appears in the newspaper and Lupin takes it as a sign from this late grandfather, Lupin I, to reclaim his diamond keepsake.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Idle Hands

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse

programme.title: Harsh Times

programme.title: Ironweed

programme.title: A Few Good Men

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.desc: Police play cat and mouse with a killer after a teen is found murdered.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A former prom queen disappears into the murky Florida swamps.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Louisville, Det. Kristen Downs is at a dead end in her search for the killer of a wheelchair bound man, until she discovers the victim's sons might be the key to the case.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a year with the gang unit, Detective Kevin Ruggiero returns to Miami Homicide, investigating a drive-by shooting that left two men dead.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When Louisville Detectives Mickey Cohn and Jon Lesher discover that their two murder victims have matching tattoos, they suspect the murders might be related.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV, Detective Jimmy Vaccaro and his team are called out at midnight to an empty desert highway, where a man's been shot dead in the middle of the road.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In April 1999, three British climbers get caught in a snowstorm near the summit of Mt. McKinley. After a night in a cave, one climber develops snow blindness and another volunteer to go down to base camp but breaks both his legs in a fall.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In June 2003, Blake Stanfield and his aged dad Neil go kayaking in the Alaskan wilderness. Everything goes fine until they run into some ice on the river, and they soon find themselves swept underneath.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In August 2002, a young man and woman, once dating, headed for the Amazon rain forest but got lost in the jungle. They have to survive the dangers of the jungle and hold on to their sanity as they find their way home.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: What A Day
programme.desc: A woman comes into the ER complaining of severe abdominal pain. To the doctor's amazement, she claims there's an alien in her stomach.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Nothing's Working
programme.desc: A woman complaining of abdominal pain finds out that she's actually pregnant - but is she ready to be a mother?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: We Need Further Tests
